name: AtkinsRéalis Group Inc.
content: AtkinsRéalis Group Inc., formerly known as SNC-Lavalin Group Inc., is a world-leading professional services and project management company. Headquartered in Montreal, Canada, the firm provides a comprehensive range of services including engineering, procurement, construction, and operations across various sectors such as nuclear, clean energy, and infrastructure. As the steward of CANDU nuclear technology, AtkinsRéalis plays a critical role in the global nuclear industry, offering full-lifecycle services for nuclear power plants. The company is dedicated to engineering a better future for our planet and its people through sustainable and innovative solutions.
